Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
209 
POST_OOPT_EXCL_DRUG_CST_SHR 
LABEL: 
Post-Out-of-Pocket Threshold Cost Share Type by Tier for Excluded Drugs 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates how the plan applies cost-sharing on this tier for excluded drugs beyond the 
Medicare Part D annual out-of-pocket threshold. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
1= Medicare Defined Amount ($0) 
2=
